error_signature: JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON parameters in HTTP request node
symptom: When attempting to update a custom field in GHL using the HTTP request node, an error message indicates that the JSON parameters are invalid.
not_this_if: The JSON structure is correct and valid
root_cause: The error occurs when the JSON being sent to the GHL API is not properly formatted. This can happen if there are syntax errors or if dynamic values are not correctly serialized into JSON format.
fix_steps: Ensure the JSON structure is correct
agent_instruction: Correct the JSON structure and ensure dynamic values are serialized properly using JSON.stringify().
